name: precision: a phrase target like 'CI' matches the resulting .github/workflows file
note: From the 327-issue dogfood report. The user asked for 'GitHub Actions CI' and the agent landed .github/workflows/ci.yml several turns later. The local-turn target list didn't include the basename, so the file got flagged 'undisclosed' repeatedly. The phrase→path alias map covers this.

events.diff:
+name: CI
+on: [push]
+jobs:
+  test:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - run: npm test
